violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Cabinets showing wear. Peeling laminate exposing bare-wood surfaces. Other bare-wood surfaces not properly sealed.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
